goal: 继续继承旧产品 ChatInput 输入区 UX

summary.title: 迁移旧产品 ChatInput 输入区 UX
summary.what: 将 vNext sidepanel 底部输入区从调试条式 composer 改为旧产品 ChatInput 的产品外壳：包含上下文摘要、可展开管理区、运行中排队消息区、可关闭的快捷提示、+ 引用标签页、/ 使用技能，以及停止/发送 action cluster。保留已有 runtime.chat 真实能力，未引入附件、队列提升、retry/fork/edit 等当前没有 backing 的假控件。
summary.why: 用户明确要求 UI/UX 直接继承旧产品，当前目标是把正在可用的旧产品交互壳迁到 vNext，而不是继续重新设计一个新的侧边栏 UI。本次迁移输入区，使聊天主路径的阅读区和输入区都更接近旧产品可验收形态。
summary.user_goal: 继续继承旧产品 ChatInput 输入区 UX

decisions.chose: 继承旧产品 ChatInput 的 composer-shell、上下文摘要、展开管理、队列区和 action cluster
decisions.rationale: 旧产品 ChatInput 已经是可用产品体验；vNext 原先的前台/debug strip 偏调试面，和当前迁移目标不一致。
rejected: 继续保留 debug 前台条和简单按钮排布

decisions.chose: 只展示当前 runtime/chat 已真实支撑的引用标签页、使用技能、发送、运行中停止和排队展示
decisions.rationale: 避免把旧产品中需要额外 runtime backing 的行为直接搬成不可用按钮。
rejected: 迁入队列 promote 控件但不接真实 route

decisions.chose: 保留旧产品 snowy_input_hint_dismissed 偏好和可关闭输入提示
decisions.rationale: 这是旧产品已有的轻量发现机制，且只依赖 localStorage，不增加后端或 extension contract。

rejected.alternative: 继续重新设计一套新的输入区 UI
rejected.reason: 当前产品目标是继承旧产品 UI/UX；重新设计会继续偏离用户要求。

review_notes: 旧产品参考路径：/Users/envvar/work/repos/snowy/browser-brain-loop/extension/src/panel/components/ChatInput.vue 与 DropdownPanel.vue。
与 int_4a4a99ee 的 overlap 已检查：前一个 intent 迁移主聊天 transcript，本 intent 迁移底部 ChatInput/composer；共享 App.vue/sidepanel-app.spec.ts 是同一 sidepanel 壳接线，语义互补，不互相排斥。
验证包含 focused sidepanel tests 22 passed、git diff --check、typecheck、build、release:smoke:mv3、bun run check 39 files / 654 tests passed。
Codex Browser 插件没有 active pane，视觉验证降级为 Playwright CLI；窄 sidepanel 截图保存在 /tmp/bbl-sidepanel-composer-old-input-narrow.png。静态页面唯一 console error 是 favicon.ico 404；真实扩展加载由 release:smoke:mv3 覆盖。

architectural_claims: sidepanel ChatInput/composer remains a local Vue UI surface consuming existing runtime chat/context behavior; no runtime protocol or public capability contract was changed.
vNext sidepanel input UX should inherit old-product ChatInput where backing behavior already exists, and should omit old-product controls that lack current backing.
behavioral_changes: Composer context now renders as an old-product-style summary bar with expandable tab/skill management.
Selected tab and skill context clears or collapses the expanded context management area when empty or after sending.
Running prompt queue items render inside the composer shell and preserve wrapped text instead of truncating the full message.
The debug 前台 chip was removed from the composer footer.
+ opens tab reference flow and / opens skill flow using icon-style controls matching the old ChatInput interaction model.
The input hint can be dismissed and is persisted with snowy_input_hint_dismissed.
security_implications: No new secrets, network surfaces, or browser permissions were added; localStorage is used only for the dismissible input hint preference.
migration_notes: After rebuild, reload apps/mv3-shell/dist in Chrome extension page for manual UAT.
Queue promote, attachment upload, retry/fork/edit remain intentionally absent until corresponding runtime-backed product behavior exists.
